description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a combination of dark and light exterior finishes. The structure features large, floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. There are multiple balconies and terraces, some with railings and outdoor furniture, enhancing the living space and offering views of the surrounding area. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a garage, and a landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs. The rear and side yards are enclosed by fencing, and there is a mix of paved and grassy areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roof, large windows, balconies, and landscaped yard, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a prominent tree in the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting balconies, a car parked on the driveway, and the transition between dark and light exterior walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass windows, fenced backyard, and a flat roof with visible interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows, a large tree, and a clear view of the garden and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small overhang, paved steps, and adjacent garage entrance
